disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Six months of progressive, deep, poorly localised bone pain in the lower back, pelvis and both legs
trigger_question_examples: Where is the pain and how long has it been going on?
Can you describe the pain?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a deep ache in my bones — my lower back, hips and both legs — and it's been building up for about six months.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Progressive proximal weakness — thighs and shoulders — with difficulty rising from a chair and a waddling gait, culminating in a low-impact fall today
trigger_question_examples: How is your strength and walking?
What happened when you fell?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My thighs just stopped working — I've been walking with a waddle and can't get out of a chair, and today my legs gave way and I fell.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Cannot weight-bear or mobilise since the fall — now bedbound
trigger_question_examples: Can you stand or walk now?
Are you able to bear weight on your legs?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No — since the fall I can't stand or walk at all, I'm stuck in bed.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Tenderness reproduced by pressing on the breastbone and shins (bony tenderness the patient reports subjectively)
trigger_question_examples: Does it hurt when you press on your breastbone or the front of your shins?
Is the tenderness in the bone or the muscle?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — it really hurts if anyone presses on my breastbone or the front of my shins.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severely restricted diet low in dairy and fortified foods, with poor overall intake
trigger_question_examples: What is your diet like?
Do you eat dairy or fortified foods?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I eat very little and hardly any dairy or those fortified foods.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Housebound with almost no sunlight exposure; home kept dark with curtains drawn
trigger_question_examples: How much time do you spend outdoors or in sunlight?
Do you get outside much?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Almost never — I'm stuck inside and keep the curtains drawn, I hardly ever get out in the sun.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Intermittent muscle spasms / cramps in the calves
trigger_question_examples: Do you get muscle cramps or spasms anywhere?
Any twitching or tingling around your mouth or hands?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been getting cramping spasms in my calves on and off.

trigger_question_examples: How is your energy overall?
Have you been feeling more tired or run down than usual?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm exhausted and washed out all the time.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No weight loss, night sweats or fevers (constitutional red-flag screen for malignancy negative)
trigger_question_examples: Have you lost weight, had drenching night sweats, or fevers?
Have you noticed any unexplained weight loss recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't lost weight or had any night sweats or fevers.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Bladder and bowel control intact; no saddle numbness (cauda equina screen negative)
trigger_question_examples: Any loss of bladder or bowel control, or numbness between your legs?
Have you had any accidents with your waterworks or bowels, or numbness in the saddle area?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, no problems with my waterworks or bowels, and no numbness down there.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No single localised groin injury today and no leg shortening/rotation reported (occult fracture cannot be excluded without imaging)
trigger_question_examples: Is one hip or groin much more painful than the rest, or does one leg look turned out or shorter?
Since the fall, is the pain worse in one specific spot, or does one leg look or feel different?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's more of an all-over ache than one spot, and I can't really tell if a leg looks different — everything just hurts.
